title: atropa lutea
intro: Atropa lutea, also known as the yellow jessamine, is a flowering vine in the Apocynaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Atropa lutea include its potential to reduce anxiety and stress, promote relaxation, and improve sleep quality. Atropa lutea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in herbal medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
